note: As-is baseline (before): planning is orchestrator-in-chat with unspecific knowledge reading and no analysis procedure; report-complete goes straight to shippable with no user verification; build has no user-owned preserved section; CLI launches prompt for approvals and the board has no delete or log-peek. Copied into the report bundle from charts/before/ (source: charts/before/current-loop.mmd); file path rewritten to the report/before/ location and renamed to the kind stem flow.mmd so before/after pair by filename in the viewer.

diagrams.title: Before: no analyst, no UAT gate, nagging launches
